ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province of origin of the athlete */,
  "entered_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who entered the athlete's data */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport the athlete participates in */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the sport */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_province FOREIGN KEY ("province") REFERENCES provinces ("province_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport the team is involved in */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and country of the team's base */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the province belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the province record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the province record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance (e.g., score, time) */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event or competition */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event or competition */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event or competition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "improvements" (
  "improvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each improvement entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "improvement_date" TEXT /* Date of the improvement */,
  "improvement_value" REAL /* Value of the improvement (e.g., percentage increase) */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event or competition where the improvement was noted */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event or competition */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event or competition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the improvement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the improvement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the improvement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("improvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_improvements_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team manager, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string or text describing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_users" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances_improvements" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance */,
  "improvement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id", "improvement_id")
)
